one_time_description: Gain on disposal of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: Innu Development Limited Partnership (49.995% owned) provides returns from businesses located in Labrador. Total revenue of IDLP was $17,799,061 with comprehensive income of $8,207,609.
notes: Consolidated entities include Shushepeshipan Ishpitentamun Mitshuap Inc., Innu Nikan General Store Corporation, and Innu Assi Leasing Corporation. Innu Development Limited Partnership (49.995%) is accounted for using modified equity method as a GBE. ISC funding is sum of operating ($6,723,909) and capital ($20,480,693) transfers. Large gain on disposal of tangible capital assets of $4,122,643 recorded. Significant CMHC deferred revenue of $8,321,476 recognized in 2024 from new agreement. Federal capital transfers jumped from $9M to $23M year over year. Accumulated surplus figure from Note 16 is $117,245,448 vs statement total of $117,199,009 — minor discrepancy in document. Net financial assets opening balance discrepancy: statement shows $23,868,558 but budget column shows $22,868,558. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text. Tangible capital assets net book value not directly extractable from provided text.
